title: Stone Cutters and Carvers, Manufacturing
description: Cut or carve stone according to diagrams and patterns.

tasks.text: Verify depths and dimensions of cuts or carvings to ensure adherence to specifications, blueprints, or models, using measuring instruments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Move fingers over surfaces of carvings to ensure smoothness of finish.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Shape, trim, or touch up roughed-out designs with appropriate tools to finish carvings.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Lay out designs or dimensions from sketches or blueprints on stone surfaces, freehand or by transferring them from tracing paper, using scribes or chalk and measuring instruments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Cut, shape, and finish rough blocks of building or monumental stone, according to diagrams or patterns.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Drill holes and cut or carve moldings and grooves in stone, according to diagrams and patterns.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select chisels, pneumatic or surfacing tools, or sandblasting nozzles, and determine sequence of use.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Study artistic objects or graphic materials, such as models, sketches, or blueprints, to plan carving or cutting techniques.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Carve designs or figures in full or bas relief on stone, employing knowledge of stone carving techniques and sense of artistry to produce carvings consistent with designers' plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Carve rough designs freehand or by chipping along marks on stone, using mallets and chisels or pneumatic tools.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Guide nozzles over stone, following stencil outlines, or chip along marks to create designs or to work surfaces down to specified finishes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Smooth surfaces of carvings, using rubbing stones.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Load sandblasting equipment with abrasives, attach nozzles to hoses, and turn valves to admit compressed air and activate jets.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove or add stencils during blasting to create differing cut depths, intricate designs, or rough, pitted finishes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Copy drawings on rough clay or plaster models.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
